title: bridelia airy-shawii
intro: Bridelia airy-shawii, also known as Bridelia ferruginea, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Bridelia airy-shawii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Bridelia airy-shawii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including tea, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
